name: Southwest Golf Ranch & Custom Fitting
about: Southwest Golf Ranch and Pickleball Club is a comprehensive golf and recreational facility offering a full driving range with TopTracer technology, an 18-hole lighted miniature golf course, and custom club fitting services. The venue features over 2.5 acres of bent grass tees, two short game practice areas, and covered mats, with a focus on providing options for golfers of all skill levels. The facility also plans to expand with indoor/outdoor pickleball courts and additional heated driving range bays, positioning itself as a one-stop destination for practice, gear, and instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: TopTracer technology on all mat bays for shot tracking
Custom club fitting using Trackman 4 for precise measurements
18-hole lighted miniature golf course with all-day unlimited play
PGA-certified professionals for individual and group instruction
Comprehensive practice facilities including bent grass tees and short game areas

food_and_drink.notes: Mini golf price includes a choice of drink or scoop of ice cream
No mention of alcohol service on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed cameras with computer algorithms for ball tracking
Used for custom club fitting with outdoor ball flight tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the venue offers club rentals and a pro shop with equipment in stock, it's recommended to bring your own clubs for a more personalized fitting experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The mini golf package includes a choice of drink or ice cream, but there's no mention of outside food or drink policies for the golf facilities.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Information about simulator time for 18 holes is not provided on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Southwest Golf Ranch and Pickleball Club is very kid-friendly, featuring an 18-hole miniature golf course with lighted play and special pricing for children.
